rect.style: stroke: rgb(161,98,7); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(255,255,255); fill-opacity: 0; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
